title: GateLM AI Safety Lab Safety Summary
description: Sanitized safety summary candidate for Lab evidence and future read models. It must not include raw detected values, raw prompt fragments, raw offsets, raw spans, credentials, or prompt hashes.

redactedPromptPreview.description: Optional sanitized preview containing placeholders only. It must not contain raw sensitive values or prompt fragments.

detectorCategories.description: GateLM-normalized detector categories such as email, person_name, postal_address, or organization_name.
